status: owner-approved controlled-beta schedule; object-storage enforcement and restore behaviour require operational verification

records.currentRule: user deletion and account deletion available
deletion/soft-deletion paths exist; backup expiry unverified
records.proposedRule: retain while the user keeps the item; remove active and quarantine objects within 24 hours of user/account deletion or terminal scan failure; encrypted recovery copies, if configured, expire within 7 days and must not be restored after intentional deletion
365 days unless incident/legal requirement needs longer
at least two years if PIPEDA applies, subject to counsel
